title: Shri Salasar Balaji Ki Aarti
intro: Read Shri Salasar Balaji Ki Aarti in Hindi and seek the divine blessings of Shri Salasar Balaji.
description:
Jayati jai jai Bajrang Bala,
Kripa kar Salasar wala॥
॥ Jayati jai jai Bajrang Bala ॥

Chait sudi punam ko janme,
Anjani pavan khushi man mein.
Prakat bhay sur vanar tan mein,
Vidit yas vikram tribhuvan mein॥
॥ Jayati jai jai Bajrang Bala ॥

Doodh peevat stan maat ke,
Nazar gayi nabh or.
Tab janani ki god se pouhche,
Udayachal par bhor॥
Arun phal lakhi ravi mukh dala,
Kripa kar Salasar wala॥
॥ Jayati jai jai Bajrang Bala ॥

Timir bhu-mandal mein chhayi,
Chibuk par Indra baj baaye.
Tabhi se Hanumat kehlaye,
Dwaya Hanuman naam paaye॥
Us avsar mein ruk gayo,
Pavan sarv unchaas.
Idhar ho gayo andhkar,
Ut rukyo vishwa ko shwaas॥
Bhaye Brahmadik behala,
Kripa kar Salasar wala॥
॥ Jayati jai jai Bajrang Bala ॥

Dev sab aaye tumhare aage,
Sakal mil vinay karan laage.
Pavan koo bhi laye saage,
Krodh sab pavan tana bhaage॥
Sabhi devta var diyo,
Araj kari kar jod.
Sunke sabki araj garaj,
Lakhi diya ravi ko chhod॥
Ho gaya jagme ujiyala,
Kripa kar Salasar wala॥
॥ Jayati jai jai Bajrang Bala ॥

Rahe Sugreev paas jaai,
Aa gaye ban mein Raghurai.
Hariravan-Sita-mai,
Vikal phirte dono bhai॥
Vipra-roop dhari Ram ko,
Kaha aap sab haal.
Kapi pati se karwayi mitrata,
Maar diya kapi baal॥
Dukh Sugreev tana taala,
Kripa kar Salasar wala॥
॥ Jayati jai jai Bajrang Bala ॥

Aagya le Raghupati ki dhaya,
Lank mein Sindhu laangh aaya.
Haal Sita ka lakh paya,
Mudrika de ban-phal khaya॥
Ban vidhwans Dashakandh sut,
Vadh kar Lank jalaya.
Choodamani sandesh triya ka,
Diya Ram ko aay॥
Hue khush tribhuvan bhupala,
Kripa kar Salasar wala॥
॥ Jayati jai jai Bajrang Bala ॥

Jod Kapi dal Raghuvar chala,
Katak hit Sindhu baandh dala.
Yuddh rach dinha vikarala,
Kiyo rakshas kul paimala॥
Lakshman ko shakti lagi,
Layau giri uthay.
Dei Sanjeevan Lakhan jiyaye,
Raghuvar harsh savay॥
Garab sab Ravan ka gaala,
Kripa kar Salasar wala॥
॥ Jayati jai jai Bajrang Bala ॥

Rachi Ahiravan ne maya,
Sovte Ram Lakhan laya.
Bane vahan Devi ki kaya,
Karne ko apna chit chaya॥
Ahiravan Ravan hatyau,
Pher haath ko haath.
Mantra Vibhishan paay aap ko,
Ho gayo Lanka naath॥
Khul gaya karma ka taala,
Kripa kar Salasar wala॥
॥ Jayati jai jai Bajrang Bala ॥

Ayodhya Ram rajya kina,
Aapko das bana leena.
Atul bal ghrit sindoor deena,
Lasat tan roop rang bhina॥
Chiranjiv Prabhu ne kiyo,
Jag mein diyo pujay.
Jo koi nishchay kar ke dhyave,
Taaki karo sahay॥
Kasht sab bhaktan ka taala,
Kripa kar Salasar wala॥
॥ Jayati jai jai Bajrang Bala ॥

Bhaktjan charan kamal seve,
Jaat aay Salasar deve.
Dhwaja nariyal bhog deve,
Manorath siddhi kar leve॥
Karaj saaro bhakt ke,
Sada karo kalyan.
Vipra nivasi Lakshmangarh ke,
Balkrishna dhar dhyan॥
Naam ki jape sada mala,
Kripa kar Salasar wala॥
॥ Jayati jai jai Bajrang Bala ॥

faq.q1: What is the main significance of performing Salasar Balaji's Aarti?
faq.a1: Performing Balaji (Hanuman Ji's) Aarti is done to destroy obstacles, gain strength, courage, and remove difficulties from life.
faq.q2: Which is the most auspicious day for worshipping Salasar Balaji?
faq.a2: Tuesday and Saturday are considered the best days for Balaji's worship and Aarti.
faq.q3: What offerings (Prasad) are preferred for Balaji during Aarti?
faq.a3: Boondi laddus, Churma, Paan, and Sindoor are very dear to Salasar Balaji.
faq.q4: Can Salasar Balaji's Aarti be performed at home?
faq.a4: Yes, it can be performed at the home altar in front of his idol or photo with complete purity and devotion.
faq.q5: What should be done after the Aarti for peace of mind?
faq.a5: Reciting the 'Hanuman Chalisa' and remembering 'Jai Shri Ram' after the Aarti is considered most fruitful.
